title: Implement Transmission and airtime calculation
description: Create python/src/lichen/sim/transmission.py. Transmission dataclass: id (uuid), source_node_id, payload (bytes), tx_power_dbm, start_time_us, end_time_us, frequency_hz. Function airtime_us(payload_len: int) -> int using fixed SF10/125kHz/CR4-5 parameters. Formula: T = (2^SF / BW) * (preamble + 4.25 + 8 + max(ceil((8*PL - 4*SF + 28 + 16) / (4*SF)) * CR, 0)). Preamble=8 symbols. Unit tests with known payload sizes.
close_reason: Wave 2 complete. 187 tests pass, ruff clean.
